reviews.comment:
No pueden ser tan malos los empleados de no dejarme utilizar  el baño.
Siempre voy a cargar nafta  y ahora por que no les cargue combustible  y no me encontraba con mi vehículo me dicen no solo para socios y clientes.

(Translated by Google)
The employees can't be that mean, not letting me use the restroom. I always go there to get gas, and now, because I didn't fill up and my car wasn't with me, they tell me it's only for members and customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VLbi1yY1hIcnZlWi1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a tomar unnm café, estaba frío. No muy buena atención. No creo que vuelva. Las medialunas estaban bien

(Translated by Google)
I went for a coffee, it was cold. The service wasn't very good. I don't think I'll go back. The croissants were okay.

I always go there; I like the way they treat me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3OGZPTWp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una sola persona para atender todas las estaciones de carga, tardan mucho en atender. No es culpa del playero que es súper amable. No es de ahora, el año pasado escribí una reseña parecida y no les importa la atención al cliente. El ACA debería comprobar la atención de sus estaciones de servicio

(Translated by Google)
There's only one person to staff all the charging stations, and the service is incredibly slow. It's not the fault of the attendant, who is extremely friendly. This isn't a new problem; I wrote a similar review last year, and they clearly don't care about customer service. The ACA should definitely check the service at its gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4eGRYTW1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Patetica atencion. Cai justonpara el pase y por mas de 5 min absolutamente nadie se digno a dirigirnos la palabra, ni a mi ni a los otros 3 que eataban eaperando cargar. Una falta total de respeto. No vuelvo nunca mas

(Translated by Google)
Pathetic service. I fell right in front of the pass, and for over five minutes, absolutely no one deigned to speak to us, not to me or the other three who were waiting to charge. A total lack of respect. I'll never come back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRbWFMQ0ZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención en el Shop y los baños muy limpios y cuidados con todas las comodidades. Vengo de Tucuman y me llevo Excelente  impresión

(Translated by Google)
The service at the shop was excellent, and the restrooms were very clean and well-maintained with all the amenities. I came from Tucumán and I'm leaving with an excellent impression.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRd05qRzVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del personal de los surtidores. Atentos y considerados . En la confitería encontrarás cosas ricas y variedad de jugos naturales, gaseosas , sándwiches frescos y ricos. Los baños en excelente estado de limpieza.  Súper recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff at the pumps. Attentive and considerate. In the cafeteria, you'll find delicious items and a variety of natural juices, sodas, and fresh and delicious sandwiches. The bathrooms are in excellent condition. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnblAtS2RnEAE

reviews.comment:
Desde Reyes, tuvimos que regresar hacia Jujuy lo que nos significó 11 km de ida y 11km de vuelta. Al llegar no habia estacionamiento. NO pude desayunar. Aclaro : soy socio del ACA y socio de YPF. Me quedó un sabor amargo ( de ayuno textual) y no se equivoquen: las 3 estrellas son por nosotros 3 sin desayunar.

(Translated by Google)
From Reyes, we had to return to Jujuy, which meant an 11 km drive each way. When we arrived, there was no parking. I couldn't have breakfast. Just to clarify: I'm a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) and a member of YPF (a gas station chain). I was left with a bitter taste (literally from fasting), and make no mistake: the 3 stars are for the three of us who didn't have breakfast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfMGZmb09BEAE
